# Samilla Loft

> Modern and bright loft in Rimini, steps from the Adriatic beach. Sea view, Wi-Fi, bikes included. Ideal for 2-3 guests. Book directly on Airbnb.

## Key information

- Address: Viale Amerigo Vespucci, 47921 Rimini RN, Italy
- Coordinates: 44.067346, 12.581245
- Check-in: 16:00 / Check-out: 10:00
- Max guests: 3
- Bedrooms: 1 | Bathrooms: 1
- Host languages: Italian, English
- Booking: [Airbnb](https://www.airbnb.it/rooms/1618206280550914997)
- EN site: https://samilla.romagna-short-stay.com/
- IT site: https://samilla.romagna-affitti-brevi.it/

## Main amenities

- Sea view
- Wi-Fi included
- Air conditioning
- Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher
- Bikes included
- Lift access
- Paid on-site parking
- TV, iron, hair dryer

## Destination

- Rimini beach: walking distance (2-3 minutes)
- Rimini city centre: 10 minutes on foot
- Cesena: 30 minutes by car
- San Marino: 35 minutes by car
- Ravenna: 40 minutes by car
- Bologna: 80 minutes by car

## Contact

- Hosts: Anna e Cesare — Lucea Collection
- Email: luceacollection@gmail.com
- Tel: +39 392 520 0650
